name: python3-packaging
title: python3-packaging
description:
core utilities for python3 packages
These core utilities currently consist of:
- Version Handling (PEP 440)
- Dependency Specification (PEP 440)
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-packaging because core utilities for python3 packages.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-packaging as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-packaging with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-packaging --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
